title: RFE: Provide download links to "latest" assets
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind feature

**Description**

Automation updates a large number of downloads continuously, and on predictable intervals (i.e. daily) that may be useful to people.  Container images, podman and podman-remote builds for multiple architectures, and installer packages to name a few.  It would be nice to provide perma-links to download these on the README, a side-page, and/or on podman.io.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

Desire to try out the latest and greatest podman, podman-remote, or podman container image

**Describe the results you received:**

* Read and understand https://cirrus-ci.org/guide/writing-tasks/#latest-build-artifacts
* I need to hand craft URLs for the artifact I'm interested in.

**Describe the results you expected:**

Click a link

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

N/A

**Output of `podman info`:**

N/A

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

N/A

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md)**

Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

Next to the `latest` tagged images on quay, we should also remind readers there are version-tags available for: `<X>`, `<X>.<Y>` and `<X>.<Y>.<Z>`

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
